description_long: This department store is a large, multi-story commercial building with a prominent central tower rising above the main structure. The facade features detailed architectural ornamentation, including rows of windows and decorative cornices, giving it a grand and historic appearance. The main building is flanked by two lower wings, each with their own set of windows and entryways, suggesting multiple access points. The central tower is the tallest element, with a stepped roof and a spire, while the rest of the building is more horizontally oriented. The exterior is primarily finished in shades of gray, with subtle variations in tone to highlight architectural details. The overall design suggests a blend of neoclassical and early 20th-century commercial architecture, suitable for a prominent urban location.
description: A grand, multi-story department store with a central tower, ornate facade, and multiple wings, finished in shades of gray. The building features detailed windows and decorative cornices, evoking a historic urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade, central tower, and detailed window arrangements.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the building, the elongated base, and the tall tower's side windows.
description_view_2: Angled view focusing on the narrow side of the tower and the rear sections of the building.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the tower, the row of smaller windows, and the building's full length.
